content: Hey, we need to decide on the color scheme for the new dashboard.
Got it. What are the options?
We're considering blue/green, dark mode only, or maybe a high-contrast orange/black.
Blue/green is classic but maybe overused. Dark mode reduces eye strain. Orange/black is bold but might not suit all users.
Let's do user research: run a poll in the team Slack.
I'll create a poll with those three options and post it to #design-team by EOD.
Also, ensure the dashboard is accessible per WCAG 2.1 AA.
Will include color contrast checks in the design review.
Great, follow up with the findings tomorrow.
